payload.title: Invite cold-path: public /invite/<code> landing + carry code through GitHub sign-in + auto-accept
payload.description: A logged-OUT person clicking /app?invite=CODE gets a raw 401, and even after signing in the code is dropped across the OAuth redirect (callback always lands on /app). FIX: a PUBLIC GET /invite/:code route (mounted before the auth gate) that — if signed in, accepts immediately and redirects to /app; if not, renders a styled 'You are invited to <project> as <role> — Sign in with GitHub to join' page whose button hits /auth/login?invite=<code>. Stash the invite code in the OAuth state cookie; on /auth/callback, after minting the session, accept the invite (setMembership) before redirecting to /app. Extract lookupInvite()/acceptInvite() from the POST /api/invites/accept handler for reuse. Make invite links use /invite/<code>.
